$comment: Design token file for the OTP Input Field component
$description: Single digit cell in an OTP input row. All 4 sizes are square (equal width and height). Border width encodes the interaction state: 1px for idle, 3px for focused/error/success rings. Shadow is removed in the Active state when the focus ring is present. The digit placeholder (0) uses display-scale typography to fill the cell visually.

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius applied to all sizes and states

horizontal.description: Left and right inset — consistent across all sizes

default.description: White background for Default, Filled, Active, Success, Error states

idle.description: Border width for Default, Filled, and Disabled states

active.description: Thicker focus ring for Active, Success, and all Error states

default.description: #d0d5dd — idle border for Default and Filled states

active.description: #155eef — focus ring color in Active state (no error)

success.description: #099250 — green ring when all digits are verified successfully

error-passive.description: #fda29b — light red ring in Default+Error and Filled+Error states (unfocused error)

error-active.description: #d92d20 — bright red ring in Active+Error state (focused with error)

shadow.description: 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.05) — applied to Default, Filled, Disabled, and passive Error states. Removed in Active state (focus ring replaces it)

empty.description: #d0d5dd — placeholder digit color in Default and Disabled states

filled.description: #344054 — digit color when a value is entered (Filled, Active, Success states)

box.description: Width and height — smallest size, square
Width and height — largest size, square

padding-vertical.description: Top and bottom inset — larger than other sizes

digit-typography.description: 48px Medium, 60px line-height, -0.96px letter-spacing — same font scale as md but in a larger box
